sourceDesc.p: See source information in individual TEI files.

projectDesc.p: Edited by Simran Bhimjyani and Shanmugapriya T. Features Indian plays written in or translated into English, spanning the 1830s to the present. Public-domain plays are released here under CC0; in-copyright plays are encoded to the same DraCor standard but maintained in a private DraCor instance. For a corpus description and full credits please see the README on GitHub.
